name: Triennale Game Collection
developer: Mario von Rickenbach, Etter Studio, Tale of Tales, Cardboard Computer, Pol Clarissou, Everest Pipkin, Santa Ragione
short_description: The Triennale Game Collection is a free virtual exhibition of video games created for the 21st International Exhibition of Triennale Milano by five of the world’s most renowned independent game designers, showcasing these artists’ experimental approach to interactivity.
